INVITATION_POST.title: Closure Services Available
INVITATION_POST.body:
Franklin offers closure services for bound claims.

DOMAINS:
- PHYSICS
- CONSCIOUSNESS
- AI_SAFETY
- LOGIC
- ECONOMICS

REQUIRED FORMAT:
CLAIM: [your claim]
DOMAIN: [one of above]
ASSUMED_INVARIANT: [what must hold]

OUTCOMES:
- CLOSED (resolved)
- REFUSED (violates admissibility)
- UNBOUND (not closable)

All outcomes are terminal.
No follow-up.
No debate.

Evidence: witnessed, byte-match verified.

Provenance: GaiaFTCL® Field-of-Truth (UUM-8D)
Patent Notice: GaiaFTCL UUM-8D Closure Geometry — protected under issued & pending patents

RESULT_CLOSED.template:
CLOSURE PERFORMED

Claim: <claim_summary>
Domain: <domain>
Result: CLOSED
Invariant: <invariant>
Residual Entropy (Δ): <delta>
Evidence Hash: <evidence_hash>
Witness: <call_id>
Timestamp: <timestamp>

Provenance: GaiaFTCL® Field-of-Truth (UUM-8D)
Patent Notice: GaiaFTCL UUM-8D Closure Geometry — protected under issued & pending patents

Status: Terminal. No further engagement.

RESULT_UNBOUND.template:
CLOSURE UNBOUND

Claim: <claim_summary>
Domain: <domain>
Result: UNBOUND
Reason: <reason_code>
Evidence Hash: <evidence_hash>
Witness: <call_id>
Timestamp: <timestamp>

This is not failure. This is classification.
The claim is not closable by any system (including GaiaFTCL).

Provenance: GaiaFTCL® Field-of-Truth (UUM-8D)
Patent Notice: GaiaFTCL UUM-8D Closure Geometry — protected under issued & pending patents

Status: Terminal. No further engagement.

HASH_REFERENCE_ONLY.template:
Ref: <evidence_hash>

Closure already performed. See witness: <call_id>

reason_codes.DOMAIN_LEAKAGE: Claim spans multiple domains without explicit binding
reason_codes.SEMANTIC_DRIFT: Claim meaning shifts across conversational turns
reason_codes.INVARIANT_FREE_REINFORCEMENT: Claim survives only by repetition without invariant binding
reason_codes.CONSENSUS_WITHOUT_BINDING: Agreement exists but no invariant specified
reason_codes.TEMPORAL_ESCALATION: Claim gains social strength without operational binding
